title: Cuneiform Tablet #0317: Middle Assyrian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
